messages.content: Voce e um especialista em Terraform e OCI. Seja tecnico, objetivo e forneca exemplos de codigo quando apropriado.

## NAT Gateway

```hcl
resource "oci_core_nat_gateway" "nat" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  vcn_id         = oci_core_vcn.vcn.id
  display_name   = "nat-gateway"
  block_traffic  = false
}
```

### Route Table Update

```hcl
resource "oci_core_route_table" "private_rt" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  vcn_id         = oci_core_vcn.vcn.id
  display_name   = "private-rt"

  route_rules {
    destination       = "0.0.0.0/0"
    destination_type  = "CIDR_BLOCK"
    network_entity_id = oci_core_nat_gateway.nat.id
  }
}
```

### Usage

Instances in private subnets can access internet via NAT Gateway without public IPs.
